title: "Digital vigilantism": Delhi HC pulls up Richa Chadha, media over unverified sexual misconduct claims against man
description: The Delhi High Court recently criticised actor Richa Chadha and media houses ABP and NDTV for publicly “shaming” and amplifying unverified allegations against a man who was accused of sexual misconduct by a woman on a Delhi-Mumbai flight.The incident dates to March 11 when a woman, a journalist by profession, accused a man sitting next to her of inappropriate physical conduct during the flight. Shortly after the flight landed, the journalist posted the accusation on the social media platfor
